# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Set environment variables
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Update and install packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    vim \
    build-essential \
    python3-dev \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set the working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the application code
COPY . /app

# Install Python dependencies if requirements.txt exists
RUN if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip3 install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt; fi

# Command to run the application (adjust as needed)
CMD ["python3", "your_script.py"]
